message:
fix: boolean column append uses int64 in local-executor (64x storage waste) + wrong rowCount when rows%8!=0

local-executor stored booleans as BigInt64Array (int64 dtype, 8 bytes/value)
while master-do used packed bits (bool dtype, 1 bit/value). Data round-tripped
as 0/1 integers in local mode but true/false in edge mode.

Also fixed a rowCount bug in both paths: when rows.length is not a multiple
of 8, Math.ceil(rows.length/8)*8 overestimates the row count. The WASM
fragmentAddBoolColumn received the inflated count, creating phantom rows.
Both callers now pass explicit rowCount.
